mapper.sql: select r.resource_id as resourceId, r.resource_code as resourceCode, r.resource_name as resourceName, r.resource_type as resourceType, r.resource_status as resourceStatus, r.monitor_status as monitorStatus, r.project_id as projectId, p.project_name as projectName, r.owner_dept_id as ownerDeptId, r.owner_name as ownerName, r.maintainer_name as maintainerName, r.cpu_cores as cpuCores, r.memory_gb as memoryGb, r.storage_gb as storageGb, r.os_name as osName, r.ip_address as ipAddress, r.software_name as softwareName, r.software_version as softwareVersion, r.license_count as licenseCount, r.delivery_time as deliveryTime, r.relation_summary as relationSummary, r.performance_summary as performanceSummary, r.create_by as createBy, r.create_time as createTime, r.update_by as updateBy, r.update_time as updateTime, r.remark from inf_resource r left join inf_project p on r.project_id = p.project_id
mapper.delete:
delete from inf_resource where resource_id in
#{resourceId}
